name: Nutrien Ltd.
description: Nutrien Ltd. is a leading global provider of crop inputs and services, playing a critical role in feeding the world. Headquartered in Canada, the company operates a world-class network of production, distribution, and agricultural retail facilities. Nutrien specializes in the production and distribution of potash, nitrogen, and phosphate products, while also offering a comprehensive range of agronomic services and digital tools. By integrating its supply chain and retail capabilities, Nutrien is uniquely positioned to efficiently serve the needs of farmers, helping them increase crop yields and improve sustainability in agricultural practices worldwide.
